calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor continued from December 8, 2005 for minor's father to appear.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Media Palines, mother; Renato Masangcay, father, present in pro per. Parties sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minor to: Daren Palines Masangcay.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Reset To Dec-15-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Meda Palines, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Daren Salanoa Palines, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Dec. 15, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for an appearance of the Minor's Father.
